calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Continued To Jul-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Theresa Flores, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: John G. Holmes.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 34 Turk Street #440, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $797.50
Attorney's Fees $240.00
Waived Costs.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOHN GARY HOLMES

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

JUDGE: OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
